finding_results.notes: Reworked the flagged rebuttal cluster so Leela's intake-room objections stay exacting and overqualified while June's lab-floor responses turn shorter, rougher, and more accusatory. The targeted exchanges no longer rely on the repeated "That's not ..." correction template.

Kept the first explicit statement of the notice's euphemistic label in the intake meeting, then rewrote the two later aftermath beats so one tracks how the copied notice spreads the damage across the department and the other makes the lockout's practical dependency on Mohit concrete.
finding_results.summary: Removed the repeated narrator glosses on the university's softening language and replaced them with distinct social and practical consequences.

pass_summaries.summary: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes: no assigned findings.
